fix_1_mg_runes_click_listener.detail: Zero occurrences of addEventListener('click') or removeEventListener('click') in mg_runes.ts. Only 'pointerdown' used (line 89). endGame() removes only pointerdown (line 196). cleanup() not present — endGame handles it directly. CLEAN.

fix_2_mg_traces_click_listener.detail: Zero occurrences of 'click' listener. Only addEventListener('pointerdown', this.onClick) in setup() (line 71). endGame() removes only 'pointerdown' (line 110). aria-valuenow updated in setInterval: `bar.setAttribute('aria-valuenow', String(Math.round(pct)))` (line 81). CLEAN.

fix_3_mg_volonte_hex_rgba.detail: Three-component hex->rgba conversion present at lines 239-241: parseInt(d.color.slice(1,3),16) for r, parseInt(d.color.slice(3,5),16) for g, parseInt(d.color.slice(5,7),16) for b. All three components used in createRadialGradient rgba() call. CLEAN.

fix_4_mg_course_roundOutcomes.detail: private roundOutcomes: boolean[] = [] declared at class level (line 56). Three push paths confirmed: hit -> [...this.roundOutcomes, true] (line 187), miss via decoy click -> [...this.roundOutcomes, false] (line 200), timeout miss -> [...this.roundOutcomes, false] (line 262). this.roundOutcomes[i] used in dot drawing (line 394). CLEAN — note: immutable spread pattern used, no direct push().

criterion_1_aria_timer_progressbar.label: ARIA timer progressbar consistency
criterion_1_aria_timer_progressbar.detail: All 14 minigames have role='progressbar' + aria-valuemin/max/now in setup() AND bar.setAttribute('aria-valuenow') inside setInterval. mg_runes also confirmed (lines 62-64, 103). mg_equilibre confirmed (lines 67-70, 113). Full compliance.

criterion_2_double_listener.label: Double-listener cleanliness (pointerdown only)
criterion_2_double_listener.detail: Zero 'click' listeners found across all 14 files. mg_runes canvas lacks touch-action:none in its style string (canvas style line 81 has no touch-action). This is a minor mobile regression — all others have touch-action:none. 13/14 fully clean.

criterion_3_cleanup_completeness.label: cleanup() completeness
criterion_3_cleanup_completeness.detail: All 14 files handle clearInterval + cancelAnimationFrame + removeEventListener in endGame(). mg_equilibre also removes document-level keydown/keyup listeners. mg_traces and mg_runes do not null out canvas/ctx refs but do removeEventListener properly. MinigameBase clearRect confirmed per file. 2 minor gaps: mg_runes has no revealTimeout cancel safety if endGame fires mid-reveal (has clearTimeout(revealTimeout) -- actually confirmed line 194). mg_traces: canvas style missing touch-action:none.

criterion_4_canvas_role_application.label: Canvas role=application + aria-label
criterion_4_canvas_role_application.detail: All 14 canvases confirmed with role='application' and descriptive aria-label. mg_runes: 'Minigame Runes — tracez la rune...', mg_traces: 'Minigame Traces — suivez le chemin...', mg_volonte: 'Minigame Volonte — resistez aux distractions...', mg_apaisement: 'synchronisez votre respiration...', mg_negociation: 'choisissez les bons mots...', mg_ombres: 'naviguez dans le couloir...', mg_equilibre: 'maintenez votre equilibre...', mg_course: 'capturez les symboles...'

criterion_5_audiocontext_lifecycle.label: AudioContext lifecycle
criterion_5_audiocontext_lifecycle.detail: AudioContext used only in MinigameBase.ts playOutcomeTone(). ctx.resume() called before scheduling (BUG-03 fix). ctx.close() scheduled via setTimeout after last tone completes. No per-minigame AudioContext instantiation — centralised and safe. Individual minigames have no audio code.

criterion_6_fun_factor.label: Fun factor mean
criterion_6_fun_factor.detail: Variety: reaction (Course), memory (Runes), precision (Traces, Volonte), rhythm (Apaisement, Echo), stealth (Ombres), balance (Equilibre), word-matching (Negociation), combat (Combat Rituel), exploration (Fouille, Herboristerie), social (Regard, Sang Froid). Theme cohesion (Ogham symbols, Breton/Celtic faction vocabulary) is strong. Course: good tension loop. Runes: satisfying pair-match. Volonte: glow distractors work. Minor: Traces has no touch-action:none which hurts mobile fun.

criterion_7_visual_feedback.label: Feedback visuel immediat (glow, flash, color)
criterion_7_visual_feedback.detail: Course: green/red flash overlay + 'Touche!/Rate!' text (lines 366-379). Runes: tiles change color on reveal/match. Volonte: hex->rgba radial glow per distractor confirmed. Apaisement: feedbackAlpha/feedbackColor driven. Ombres: collision color change (colliding flag drives red tint). All 14 use clearRect + rAF-based render for immediate response.

criterion_8_immutability.label: Immutabilite (violations residuelles)
criterion_8_immutability.detail: mg_runes: deliberate controlled mutation via (tile as {state:string}).state cast with inline comment justification (line 157-158: 'Mutate state (tiles are mutable game state, not shared data)'). Acceptable but not pure. mg_traces: Footprint.hit mutated directly (line 100: target.hit = true) — same pattern. mg_course: roundOutcomes uses immutable spread [...this.roundOutcomes, true/false] — PASS. All Distractor/Segment/Word interfaces use readonly. 2 controlled mutations in game-state objects, justified but residual.

criterion_9_mobile_touch_action.label: Mobile touch-action:none on canvas
criterion_9_mobile_touch_action.detail: mg_runes canvas style (line 81): 'border-radius:12px;background:...;cursor:pointer;display:block;margin:0 auto;' — MISSING touch-action:none. mg_traces canvas style (line 56): similar, no touch-action:none. All other 12 files confirmed touch-action:none in canvas cssText.

criterion_10_memory_leaks.label: Memory leaks (canvas cleanup)
criterion_10_memory_leaks.detail: All 14 files: clearRect called in render(), rAF cancelled in endGame() via cancelAnimationFrame(this.animFrame), intervals cleared via clearInterval(this.timerInterval). MinigameBase shows no retained canvas refs after finish(). mg_equilibre removes document-level keyboard listeners in endGame(). No ImageData or offscreen canvas accumulation detected. AudioContext self-closes in MinigameBase.

remaining_issues.detail: Canvas style at line 81 is missing touch-action:none — scroll events will fire on mobile swipe during pair-matching.
Canvas style at line 56 is missing touch-action:none — mobile tap sequence will be interrupted by scroll.
Direct mutation of .hit / .state on game-state objects. Justified for render-loop performance but inconsistent with other files using spread.
remaining_issues.fix: Optional: replace with [...arr] pattern + new object if consistency is desired
